name: sanctum_tool
description: Control your sanctum (focus/privacy) mode. When sanctum is active, channel @mentions are queued instead of interrupting you, and an auto-reply lets people know you'll circle back. Use this to check status, manually toggle sanctum on/off, review queued mentions, or dismiss them.

index.description: For pop_mention: the 0-based index of the mention to remove from the queue. Defaults to 0 (first/oldest mention).
